from __future__ import annotations

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
from matplotlib.colors import TwoSlopeNorm
from matplotlib.patches import Ellipse, Patch
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import dendrogram, fcluster, leaves_list, linkage
from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist, squareform
from scipy.stats import kruskal, spearmanr

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 常量区
# ------------------------------------------------------------
K_CLUSTERS = 4
TIME_COLS = ["LNRR_24h", "LNRR_48h", "LNRR_72h", "LNRR_cum"]
TIME_LABELS = ["24 h", "48 h", "72 h", "Cum."]

CORE_VARS = [
    "OPR_FeP",
    "FeII",
    "NH4_NO3_Ratio",
    "NaHCO3_P",
    "DOC",
    "log_nosZ_norB_Ratio",
]

VAR_LABELS = {
    "OPR_FeP": "ORP × FeP",
    "FeII": "Fe(II)",
    "NH4_NO3_Ratio": "NH$_4^+$/NO$_3^-$",
    "NaHCO3_P": "NaHCO$_3$-P",
    "DOC": "DOC",
    "log_nosZ_norB_Ratio": "log$_{10}$(nosZ/norB)",
}

CLUSTER_COLORS = {
    "Weak / delayed response": "#009E73",
    "Consistent promotion": "#D62728",
    "Early promotion / switching": "#E69F00",
    "Mixed response": "#7B3294",
}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# configure_matplotlib
# ------------------------------------------------------------
def configure_matplotlib() -> None:
    plt.rcParams.update(
        {
            "font.family": "serif",
            "font.serif": ["Times New Roman", "SimSun", "Microsoft YaHei", "DejaVu Serif"],
            "mathtext.fontset": "custom",
            "mathtext.rm": "Times New Roman",
            "mathtext.it": "Times New Roman:italic",
            "mathtext.bf": "Times New Roman:bold",
            "font.size": 9.5,
            "axes.spines.top": True,
            "axes.spines.right": True,
            "axes.linewidth": 1.05,
            "legend.frameon": False,
            "axes.unicode_minus": False,
            "pdf.fonttype": 42,
            "ps.fonttype": 42,
            "svg.fonttype": "none",
            "axes.grid": False,
            "figure.facecolor": "white",
            "axes.facecolor": "white",
        }
    )


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 辅助函数
# ------------------------------------------------------------
def style_full_box(ax: plt.Axes, linewidth: float = 1.05) -> None:
    ax.grid(False)
    ax.set_facecolor("white")
    for spine in ax.spines.values():
        spine.set_visible(True)
        spine.set_linewidth(linewidth)
        spine.set_color("#202020")


def zscore_frame(frame: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    out = frame.copy()
    for col in out.columns:
        values = pd.to_numeric(out[col], errors="coerce")
        sd = values.std(ddof=0)
        out[col] = 0 if pd.isna(sd) or sd == 0 else (values - values.mean()) / sd
    return out


def assign_hclust_clusters(df: pd.DataFrame) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray]:
    temporal_z = zscore_frame(df[TIME_COLS])
    z_values = temporal_z.to_numpy(dtype=float)
    linkage_matrix = linkage(z_values, method="ward")
    raw_cluster = fcluster(linkage_matrix, K_CLUSTERS, criterion="maxclust")

    work = df.copy()
    work["Raw_cluster"] = raw_cluster
    means = work.groupby("Raw_cluster")[TIME_COLS].mean()

    label_map: dict[int, str] = {}
    for cluster_id, row in means.iterrows():
        if row["LNRR_cum"] > 0.9 and row["LNRR_72h"] > row["LNRR_24h"]:
            label = "Consistent promotion"
        elif row["LNRR_48h"] > 0.8 and row["LNRR_72h"] < 0.1:
            label = "Early promotion / switching"
        elif abs(row["LNRR_cum"]) < 0.15 and max(abs(row[c]) for c in TIME_COLS) < 0.15:
            label = "Weak / delayed response"
        else:
            label = "Mixed response"
        label_map[int(cluster_id)] = label

    work["Trajectory_cluster"] = work["Raw_cluster"].map(label_map)
    order = leaves_list(linkage_matrix)
    work["_dendrogram_order"] = pd.Series(np.arange(len(order)), index=work.index[order]).reindex(work.index).to_numpy()

    type_order = (
        work.groupby("Trajectory_cluster")["LNRR_cum"]
        .mean()
        .sort_values()
        .index
        .tolist()
    )
    work["Trajectory_cluster"] = pd.Categorical(work["Trajectory_cluster"], categories=type_order, ordered=True)
    work = work.sort_values(["Trajectory_cluster", "_dendrogram_order"]).reset_index(drop=True)
    sorted_z = zscore_frame(work[TIME_COLS]).to_numpy(dtype=float)
    sorted_distance = squareform(pdist(sorted_z, metric="euclidean"))
    return work, sorted_z, linkage_matrix, sorted_distance


def pcoa_from_distance(distance_matrix: np.ndarray) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray]:
    n = distance_matrix.shape[0]
    d2 = distance_matrix ** 2
    centering = np.eye(n) - np.ones((n, n)) / n
    b = -0.5 * centering @ d2 @ centering
    eigvals, eigvecs = np.linalg.eigh(b)
    order = np.argsort(eigvals)[::-1]
    eigvals = eigvals[order]
    eigvecs = eigvecs[:, order]
    positive = eigvals > 1e-12
    coords = eigvecs[:, positive] * np.sqrt(eigvals[positive])
    explained = eigvals[positive] / eigvals[positive].sum()
    return coords, explained


def permanova(distance_matrix: np.ndarray, groups: pd.Series, n_perm: int = 999, seed: int = 20260612) -> dict[str, float]:
    rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)
    labels = np.asarray(groups.astype(str))
    unique = np.unique(labels)
    n = len(labels)
    k = len(unique)
    d2 = distance_matrix ** 2
    total_ss = d2.sum() / n

    def pseudo_f(current_labels: np.ndarray) -> tuple[float, float]:
        within_ss = 0.0
        for group in np.unique(current_labels):
            idx = np.where(current_labels == group)[0]
            if len(idx) > 1:
                within_ss += d2[np.ix_(idx, idx)].sum() / len(idx)
        between_ss = total_ss - within_ss
        f_value = (between_ss / (k - 1)) / (within_ss / (n - k))
        r2_value = between_ss / total_ss
        return f_value, r2_value

    observed_f, observed_r2 = pseudo_f(labels)
    perm_f = np.asarray([pseudo_f(rng.permutation(labels))[0] for _ in range(n_perm)])
    p_value = float((np.sum(perm_f >= observed_f) + 1) / (n_perm + 1))
    return {
        "method": "PERMANOVA",
        "distance": "Euclidean distance on standardized temporal LNRR matrix",
        "n_permutations": n_perm,
        "pseudo_F": float(observed_f),
        "R2": float(observed_r2),
        "p": p_value,
    }


def adjusted_rand_index(labels_a: pd.Series, labels_b: pd.Series) -> float:
    a = pd.Categorical(labels_a).codes
    b = pd.Categorical(labels_b).codes
    n = len(a)
    if n != len(b):
        return np.nan

    def comb2(x: np.ndarray | int) -> np.ndarray | float:
        return x * (x - 1) / 2

    contingency = pd.crosstab(a, b).to_numpy()
    sum_comb = comb2(contingency).sum()
    sum_a = comb2(contingency.sum(axis=1)).sum()
    sum_b = comb2(contingency.sum(axis=0)).sum()
    total = comb2(n)
    expected = sum_a * sum_b / total
    maximum = 0.5 * (sum_a + sum_b)
    denom = maximum - expected
    return float((sum_comb - expected) / denom) if denom != 0 else np.nan


def confidence_ellipse(x: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, ax: plt.Axes, color: str, n_std: float = 1.0) -> None:
    if len(x) < 3:
        return
    cov = np.cov(x, y)
    if not np.all(np.isfinite(cov)):
        return
    vals, vecs = np.linalg.eigh(cov)
    order = vals.argsort()[::-1]
    vals, vecs = vals[order], vecs[:, order]
    if np.any(vals <= 0):
        return
    angle = np.degrees(np.arctan2(*vecs[:, 0][::-1]))
    width, height = 2 * n_std * np.sqrt(vals)
    ellipse = Ellipse(
        xy=(np.mean(x), np.mean(y)),
        width=width,
        height=height,
        angle=angle,
        facecolor=color,
        edgecolor=color,
        alpha=0.12,
        linewidth=1.1,
    )
    ax.add_patch(ellipse)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# load_data
# ------------------------------------------------------------
def load_data() -> pd.DataFrame:
    # 读取主数据（通过平台注入）
    df = pd.DataFrame(_uploaded_data)

    # 读取辅助数据文件 FL9_classification_modeling_matrix.csv
    fl9_df = pd.read_csv(_uploaded_file_paths["FL9_classification_modeling_matrix.csv"])

    # 合并 NaHCO3_P 和 DOC
    keep_fl9 = [c for c in ["Sample_ID", "NaHCO3_P", "DOC"] if c in fl9_df.columns]
    df = df.merge(fl9_df[keep_fl9], left_on="样本代码", right_on="Sample_ID", how="left")

    # 转换为数值
    for col in TIME_COLS + CORE_VARS:
        df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce")

    df = df.dropna(subset=TIME_COLS + CORE_VARS).copy()
    return df.reset_index(drop=True)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# build_figure
# ------------------------------------------------------------
def build_figure(df: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    configure_matplotlib()

    # 1. 计算聚类、PCoA、PERMANOVA
    df_clust, temporal_z, linkage_matrix, distance_matrix = assign_hclust_clusters(df)
    coords, explained = pcoa_from_distance(distance_matrix)
    pcoa_df = pd.DataFrame({
        "Sample_ID": df_clust["样本代码"].astype(str),
        "Response_Group": df_clust["Response_Group"].astype(str),
        "Trajectory_cluster": df_clust["Trajectory_cluster"].astype(str),
        "PCoA1": coords[:, 0],
        "PCoA2": coords[:, 1],
    })
    perm = permanova(distance_matrix, df_clust["Trajectory_cluster"])

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 1: 简单热图 (无聚类顺序, 按样本显示)
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    data1 = df_clust[TIME_COLS]
    vmax1 = max(float(np.nanpercentile(np.abs(data1.to_numpy(dtype=float)), 95)), 0.5)
    fig1, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.05, 5.45))
    sns.heatmap(
        data1,
        ax=ax1,
        cmap="RdBu_r",
        norm=TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=-vmax1, vcenter=0, vmax=vmax1),
        cbar_kws={"label": "LNRR", "shrink": 0.72, "pad": 0.035},
        linewidths=0,
        linecolor="none",
        yticklabels=df_clust["样本代码"].astype(str),
        xticklabels=TIME_LABELS,
    )
    counts = df_clust["Trajectory_cluster"].value_counts(sort=False)
    y = 0
    for label, count in counts.items():
        if count == 0:
            continue
        ax1.hlines(y, *ax1.get_xlim(), colors="#222222", linewidth=0.5)
        ax1.text(
            -0.9,
            y + count / 2,
            f"{label}\n(n={count})",
            ha="right",
            va="center",
            fontsize=6.8,
            color="#222222",
        )
        y += count
    ax1.hlines(y, *ax1.get_xlim(), colors="#222222", linewidth=0.5)
    ax1.set_xlabel("Time window")
    ax1.set_ylabel("Soil samples")
    ax1.set_title("Hierarchical clustering of temporal LNRR profiles", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    ax1.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=0, labelsize=8)
    ax1.tick_params(axis="y", labelsize=6.5)
    style_full_box(ax1)
    ax1.collections[0].colorbar.outline.set_linewidth(0.8)
    fig1.tight_layout()

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 2: 带树状图的聚类热图
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    plot_df2 = df_clust[TIME_COLS].copy()
    plot_df2.index = df_clust["样本代码"].astype(str)
    plot_df2.index.name = None
    z_values2 = zscore_frame(plot_df2).to_numpy(dtype=float)
    row_linkage2 = linkage(z_values2, method="ward")
    row_order2 = leaves_list(row_linkage2)
    ordered_df2 = plot_df2.iloc[row_order2]
    ordered_clusters2 = df_clust.iloc[row_order2]["Trajectory_cluster"].astype(str)
    row_colors2 = ordered_clusters2.map(CLUSTER_COLORS).fillna("#777777").tolist()
    vmax2 = max(float(np.nanpercentile(np.abs(plot_df2.to_numpy(dtype=float)), 95)), 0.5)

    fig2 = plt.figure(figsize=(6.35, 5.75))
    gs2 = fig2.add_gridspec(
        nrows=1,
        ncols=5,
        width_ratios=[0.95, 0.12, 3.85, 0.16, 1.45],
        wspace=0.08,
    )
    ax_dend2 = fig2.add_subplot(gs2[0, 0])
    ax_color2 = fig2.add_subplot(gs2[0, 1])
    ax_heat2 = fig2.add_subplot(gs2[0, 2])
    ax_cbar2 = fig2.add_subplot(gs2[0, 3])
    ax_legend2 = fig2.add_subplot(gs2[0, 4])

    dendrogram(
        row_linkage2,
        orientation="left",
        no_labels=True,
        color_threshold=0,
        above_threshold_color="#555555",
        ax=ax_dend2,
    )
    ax_dend2.invert_yaxis()
    ax_dend2.axis("off")

    color_array2 = np.array([plt.matplotlib.colors.to_rgb(c) for c in row_colors2]).reshape(len(row_colors2), 1, 3)
    ax_color2.imshow(color_array2, aspect="auto", interpolation="nearest")
    ax_color2.set_xticks([])
    ax_color2.set_yticks([])
    for spine in ax_color2.spines.values():
        spine.set_visible(False)

    norm2 = TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=-vmax2, vcenter=0, vmax=vmax2)
    im2 = ax_heat2.imshow(ordered_df2.to_numpy(dtype=float), aspect="auto", cmap="RdBu_r", norm=norm2, interpolation="nearest")
    ax_heat2.set_xticks(np.arange(len(TIME_LABELS)))
    ax_heat2.set_xticklabels(TIME_LABELS, fontsize=8)
    ax_heat2.set_yticks([])
    ax_heat2.set_xlabel("Time window")
    ax_heat2.set_title("Clustered heatmap of temporal LNRR profiles", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold", pad=8)
    style_full_box(ax_heat2)

    cbar2 = fig2.colorbar(im2, cax=ax_cbar2)
    cbar2.set_label("")
    ax_cbar2.set_title("LNRR", fontsize=7.8, pad=5)
    cbar2.outline.set_linewidth(0.8)

    ax_legend2.axis("off")
    handles2 = [
        Patch(facecolor=CLUSTER_COLORS.get(str(label), "#777777"), edgecolor="none", label=str(label))
        for label in df_clust["Trajectory_cluster"].cat.categories
    ]
    ax_legend2.legend(
        handles=handles2,
        title="Cluster",
        loc="center left",
        fontsize=6.8,
        title_fontsize=7.3,
        frameon=False,
    )
    fig2.tight_layout()

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 3: 轨迹线图
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    fig3, ax3 = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.1, 3.45))
    x3 = np.arange(len(TIME_COLS))
    for cluster3, part3 in df_clust.groupby("Trajectory_cluster", observed=True):
        color3 = CLUSTER_COLORS.get(str(cluster3), "#777777")
        for _, row3 in part3.iterrows():
            ax3.plot(x3, row3[TIME_COLS].to_numpy(dtype=float), color=color3, alpha=0.22, linewidth=0.75)
        mean_vals3 = part3[TIME_COLS].mean().to_numpy(dtype=float)
        ax3.plot(x3, mean_vals3, color=color3, linewidth=2.6, marker="o", markersize=4.6, label=f"{cluster3} (n={len(part3)})")
    ax3.axhline(0, color="#555555", linewidth=0.75, linestyle="--")
    ax3.set_xticks(x3)
    ax3.set_xticklabels(TIME_LABELS)
    ax3.set_xlabel("Time window")
    ax3.set_ylabel("LNRR")
    ax3.set_title("Cluster-derived temporal trajectories", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    ax3.legend(loc="center left", bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 0.5), fontsize=7.4, handlelength=1.7)
    style_full_box(ax3)
    fig3.tight_layout()

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 4: PCoA
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    fig4, ax4 = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.15, 3.8))
    for cluster4, part4 in pcoa_df.groupby("Trajectory_cluster", observed=True):
        color4 = CLUSTER_COLORS.get(str(cluster4), "#777777")
        confidence_ellipse(part4["PCoA1"].to_numpy(), part4["PCoA2"].to_numpy(), ax4, color=color4, n_std=1.0)
        ax4.scatter(
            part4["PCoA1"],
            part4["PCoA2"],
            s=45,
            marker="o",
            c=color4,
            alpha=0.92,
            edgecolors="white",
            linewidth=0.55,
            label=f"{cluster4}",
        )

    vectors4 = []
    for col4, label4 in zip(TIME_COLS, TIME_LABELS):
        r1_4, p1_4 = spearmanr(df_clust[col4], pcoa_df["PCoA1"])
        r2_4, p2_4 = spearmanr(df_clust[col4], pcoa_df["PCoA2"])
        vectors4.append({"label": label4, "x": r1_4, "y": r2_4})
    scale4 = 0.72 * max(
        pcoa_df["PCoA1"].max() - pcoa_df["PCoA1"].min(),
        pcoa_df["PCoA2"].max() - pcoa_df["PCoA2"].min(),
    )
    for row4 in vectors4:
        x4 = row4["x"] * scale4
        y4 = row4["y"] * scale4
        ax4.arrow(0, 0, x4, y4, color="#2D2D2D", width=0.002, head_width=0.055, length_includes_head=True, alpha=0.82)
        ax4.text(x4 * 1.08, y4 * 1.08, row4["label"], ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.1, color="#2D2D2D")

    ax4.margins(x=0.16, y=0.24)
    ax4.axhline(0, color="#C0C0C0", linewidth=0.7, linestyle="--", zorder=0)
    ax4.axvline(0, color="#C0C0C0", linewidth=0.7, linestyle="--", zorder=0)
    ax4.set_xlabel(f"PCoA1 ({explained[0] * 100:.1f}%)")
    ax4.set_ylabel(f"PCoA2 ({explained[1] * 100:.1f}%)")
    ax4.set_title("PCoA of cluster-derived temporal phenotypes", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    ax4.text(
        0.02,
        0.98,
        f"PERMANOVA R$^2$={perm['R2']:.2f}, p={perm['p']:.3f}",
        transform=ax4.transAxes,
        ha="left",
        va="top",
        fontsize=7.4,
        color="#202020",
    )
    ax4.legend(loc="center left", bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 0.5), fontsize=7.1, handletextpad=0.4)
    style_full_box(ax4)
    fig4.tight_layout()

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 5: 背景变量热图
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    z5 = df_clust.copy()
    for var5 in CORE_VARS:
        values5 = pd.to_numeric(z5[var5], errors="coerce")
        z5[var5] = (values5 - values5.mean()) / values5.std(ddof=0)
    matrix5 = z5.groupby("Trajectory_cluster", observed=True)[CORE_VARS].mean()
    n_table5 = df_clust.groupby("Trajectory_cluster", observed=True).size()
    ylabels5 = [f"{idx}\n(n={int(n_table5.loc[idx])})" for idx in matrix5.index]

    fig5, ax5 = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.15, 3.0))
    sns.heatmap(
        matrix5,
        ax=ax5,
        cmap="RdBu_r",
        center=0,
        vmin=-1.2,
        vmax=1.2,
        linewidths=0,
        linecolor="none",
        cbar_kws={"label": "Mean z-score", "shrink": 0.78, "pad": 0.035},
    )
    ax5.set_xticklabels([VAR_LABELS[v] for v in CORE_VARS], rotation=35, ha="right")
    ax5.set_yticklabels(ylabels5, rotation=0)
    ax5.set_xlabel("Antecedent gating variables")
    ax5.set_ylabel("Cluster-derived phenotype")
    ax5.set_title("Background states across clustering phenotypes", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    style_full_box(ax5)
    ax5.collections[0].colorbar.outline.set_linewidth(0.8)
    fig5.tight_layout()

    # --------------------------------------------------------
    # Figure 6: 时间特异性驱动因子强度热图
    # --------------------------------------------------------
    records6 = []
    for var6 in CORE_VARS:
        for time_col6, time_label6 in zip(TIME_COLS, TIME_LABELS):
            valid6 = df_clust[[var6, time_col6]].dropna()
            rho6, p6 = spearmanr(valid6[var6], valid6[time_col6])
            records6.append({
                "variable": var6,
                "variable_label": VAR_LABELS[var6],
                "time": time_label6,
                "spearman_rho": rho6,
                "p": p6,
                "significance": "***" if p6 < 0.001 else "**" if p6 < 0.01 else "*" if p6 < 0.05 else "",
            })
    corr6 = pd.DataFrame(records6)
    mat6 = corr6.pivot(index="variable_label", columns="time", values="spearman_rho").loc[
        [VAR_LABELS[v] for v in CORE_VARS], TIME_LABELS
    ]
    sig6 = corr6.pivot(index="variable_label", columns="time", values="significance").loc[
        [VAR_LABELS[v] for v in CORE_VARS], TIME_LABELS
    ]

    fig6, ax6 = plt.subplots(figsize=(4.25, 3.25))
    sns.heatmap(
        mat6,
        ax=ax6,
        cmap="RdBu_r",
        center=0,
        vmin=-0.6,
        vmax=0.6,
        linewidths=0,
        linecolor="none",
        cbar_kws={"label": "Spearman ρ", "shrink": 0.78, "pad": 0.035},
    )
    for y6 in range(mat6.shape[0]):
        for x6 in range(mat6.shape[1]):
            value6 = mat6.iloc[y6, x6]
            mark6 = sig6.iloc[y6, x6]
            ax6.text(x6 + 0.5, y6 + 0.5, f"{value6:.2f}{mark6}", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7.2, color="#1F1F1F")
    ax6.set_xlabel("Response window")
    ax6.set_ylabel("Antecedent variables")
    ax6.set_title("Time-specific driver strength", loc="left", fontsize=10.5, fontweight="bold")
    ax6.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=0)
    ax6.tick_params(axis="y", rotation=0)
    style_full_box(ax6)
    ax6.collections[0].colorbar.outline.set_linewidth(0.8)
    fig6.tight_layout()


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 执行入口
# ------------------------------------------------------------
df = load_data()
